violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface Reach-in-coolers was not cleaned as frequently as required.
Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitize solution for mechanical warewashing machine was not maintained at the proper concentration * . Corrected on site

Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. Sautee reach in 50F - 55F. Needs service.
Reheating food. — --Potentially hazardous food was not reheated rapidly so all parts reached a temperature of 165F for 15 seconds within one hour. NOTE -- Reviewed reheating of (stew/potato) process.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. Gaskets on the drawer unit on the line need replace.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Clean the ice cream freezer.
Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitize solution for mechanical warewashing machine was not maintained at the proper concentration of 50 ppm chlorine. Primed, corrected on site.
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
